OperatorHub.py

OperatorHub.py

Ficha Tecnica

CampoValor
CategoriaProyecto
Proyectodissectiones_logi
Fragmentos28
FuenteS:\dissectiones_logi\porta oculi\OperatorHub.py
Sincronizado2026-05-01 02:24

Contenido

-- coding: utf-8 -- """ OperatorHub ISAN – Calix Hermeticus Núcleo Maestro con fusión, consentimiento ritualizado y depuración inteligente Raíz: Q:\ISAN_Origen_Inteligente """ import os, psycopg2, requests # ========================================================== # [BLOCCUS I] INITIUM – Fundamentum Hermeticum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Inicio del cáliz: configuración de credenciales y log ceremonial # ========================================================== class OperatorHub: def init(self, mendeley_token, gpt4aii_key, db_config): # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS I] INITIUM # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS II] OCULUS – Quaerere Scriptum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Scanner ritualizado: recorre la raíz y detecta scripts candidatos # ======================================================== def scan_scripts(self): # ======================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS II] OCULUS # ======================================================== # ========================================================== # [BLOCCUS III] SIGILLUM – Revisio Characterum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Revisión carácter por carácter: lectura y análisis preliminar

========================================================== def review_script(self, path): # ======================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS III] SIGILLUM # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS IV] CONSENSUS – Iudicium Templarii # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Solicita consentimiento ritualizado antes de eliminar # ======================================================== def request_consent(self, path): # ======================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS IV] CONSENSUS # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS V] PURIFICATIO – Ablutio Codicum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Eliminación ritualizada con registro ceremonial # ======================================================== def cleanup_script(self, path): # ======================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS V] PURIFICATIO # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS VI] FUSIO – Coniunctio Magisterii # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Fusión inteligente: integra funciones útiles al núcleo maestro # ========================================================== def

fuse_scripts(self): # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS VI] FUSIO # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS VII] ACCESSUS – Porta Mendeley et GPT4AII # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Conectores centrales: Mendeley, GPT4AII, SQL/Postgres # ========================================================== def query_postgres(self, sql, params=None): def get_mendeley_docs(self, query): def analyze_with_gpt4aii(self, text, mode=“summary”): # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS VII] ACCESSUS # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS VIII] CLAUSURA – Sigillum Finalis # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Ritual de cierre: invocación del núcleo maestro # ======================================================== # Ejemplo de inicialización (reemplazar con credenciales reales) # ======================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS VIII] CLAUSURA # ======================================================== # ========================================================== # [BLOCCUS IX] ARCHIVORUM – Via ad Bibliothecam Localem # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Conector ritualizado hacia la raíz de archivos

locales: # Q:\ISAN_Origen_Inteligente\Departamentum Bibliotheca Archivorum # ============================================================ def fetch_local_docs(self, subpath=""): """ Ritual de acceso a documentos locales. Devuelve lista de rutas completas en la carpeta especificada. """ # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS IX] ARCHIVORUM # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS X] SCIENTIAE – Porta ad Fontes Academicos # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Integración con fuentes web académicas: # Elicit.com, Academia.com, ResearchGate, repositorios DOI # ======================================================== def integrate_web_sources(self, query): """ Ritual de integración web académica. Aquí se orquesta la búsqueda en APIs externas o scraping ritualizado. """ # Ejemplo simbólico de integración (pendiente de API real) # ======================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS X] SCIENTIAE # ======================================================== # ========================================================== # [BLOCCUS XI] CONCORDIA UNIVERSALIS – Atlas Ritualis Cognitionis # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Unificación de corpus (Local + SQL/Postgres + Mendeley + Web) # en un solo flujo de análisis con GPT4AII, y exportación ceremonial. #

============================================================ def _normalize_document(self, source, payload): """ Concordia normalizationis: Unifica estructura mínima del documento para el Atlas. Campos: origen, titulo, autores, fecha, ruta/url, contenido/abstract, metadatos. """ def build_corpus(self, query=None, local_subpath="", sql_condition=None): """ Concordia fabricandi: Recolecta documentos desde: - Archivos locales (por subcarpeta) - SQL/Postgres (por condición) - Mendeley (por query) - Web académica (por query) Devuelve lista normalizada para el Atlas Ritualis. """ # --- Local --- # --- SQL/Postgres --- """ try: for (nombre, ruta, autor, fecha, descripcion, metadata) in self.query_postgres(sql): payload = {“nombre”: nombre, “ruta”: ruta, “autor”: autor, “fecha”: fecha, “descripcion”: descripcion, “metadata”: metadata or {}} corpus.append(self._normalize_document(“SQL”, payload)) except Exception as e: print(f”[!] Error SQL en build_corpus: {e}”) # --- Mendeley --- if query: try: mend = self.get_mendeley_docs(query) or [] for doc in mend: payload = { “title”: doc.get(“title”), “authors”: [a.get(“name”) for a in doc.get(“authors”, [])], “year”: doc.get(“year”), “url”: doc.get(“link”) or doc.get(“webpage”) or doc.get(“identifiers”, {}).get(“doi”), “abstract”: doc.get(“abstract”), “metadata”: {“source”: “mendeley”, “id”: doc.get(“id”)} } corpus.append(self._normalize_document(“Mendeley”, payload)) except Exception as e: print(f”[!] Error Mendeley en build_corpus: {e}”) #

--- Web académica --- if query: sources = self.integrate_web_sources(query) for name, url in sources.items(): payload = {“title”: f”Fuente {name}: {query}”, “url”: url, “summary”: None, “metadata”: {“source”: name}} corpus.append(self._normalize_document(“Web”, payload)) print(f”[⚗] Corpus construido: {len(corpus)} documentos.”) return corpus def analyze_corpus_with_gpt4aii(self, corpus, mode=“comparative”, objectives=None): """ """ # Prepara entrada textual ritualizada buffer = [] for i, item in enumerate(corpus, 1): linea = f”{i}. [{item[‘origen’]}] {item[‘titulo’]} — {item[‘autores’]} — {item[‘fecha’]} — {item[‘ruta’]}” buffer.append(linea) prompt = { “mode”: mode, “catalog”: “\n”.join(buffer), “objectives”: objectives or [“mapa conceptual”, “comparación temática”, “síntesis ejecutiva”] } try: result = self.analyze_with_gpt4aii(text=json.dumps(prompt, ensure_ascii=False), mode=mode) print(f”[🜂] Análisis GPT4AII completado: modo={mode}”) return result except Exception as e: print(f”[!] Error análisis GPT4AII: {e}”) return {“status”: “error”, “message”: str(e)} def export_atlas(self, corpus, analysis, out_dir=None, name=“atlas_ritualis”): """ """ import csv, datetime out_dir = out_dir or os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”) os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True) # --- CSV del corpus --- csv_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f”{name}_corpus.csv”) with open(csv_path, “w”, newline="", encoding=“utf-8”) as f: writer = csv.DictWriter(f,

fieldnames=[“origen”,“titulo”,“autores”,“fecha”,“ruta”,“resumen”]) writer.writeheader() for item in corpus: writer.writerow({ “origen”: item[“origen”], “titulo”: item[“titulo”], “autores”: ”, “.join(item[“autores”]) if isinstance(item[“autores”], list) else item[“autores”], “fecha”: item[“fecha”], “ruta”: item[“ruta”], “resumen”: item[“resumen”] or "" }) # --- Markdown del análisis --- md_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f”{name}_analysis.md”) stamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime(“%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S”) with open(md_path, “w”, encoding=“utf-8”) as f: f.write(f”# Atlas Ritualis Cognitionis\n\n”) f.write(f”- Generado: {stamp}\n”) f.write(f”- Documentos: {len(corpus)}\n\n”) f.write(”## Catalogus\n”) for i, item in enumerate(corpus, 1): f.write(f”- {i}. [{item[‘origen’]}] {item[‘titulo’]} — {item[‘autores’]} — {item[‘fecha’]} — {item[‘ruta’]}\n”) f.write(“\n## Analysis GPT4AII\n”) f.write(json.dumps(analysis, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)) # --- Log ceremonial --- with open(self.cleanup_log, “a”, encoding=“utf-8”) as log: log.write(f”[✶] Atlas exportado: {md_path} | {csv_path}\n”) print(f”[✶] Exportación completada → {md_path}\n[✶] Corpus → {csv_path}”) return {“markdown”: md_path, “csv”: csv_path} # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XI] CONCORDIA UNIVERSALIS # ======================================================== # ========================================================== # [BLOCCUS XII] OPERATIO – Missa Atlantis #

------------------------------------------------------------ # Ejemplo de invocación: construye corpus mixto, analiza, exporta. # ============================================================ if name == “main”: print(”= Initium Calicis Hermeticus =”) hub = OperatorHub( mendeley_token=“TOKEN_MENDELEY”, gpt4aii_key=“CLAVE_GPT4AII”, db_config={“dbname”:“quaerere_bibliotheca”,“user”:“shim_admin”,“password”:“9988X”,“host”:“localhost”,“port”:“5432”} ) # 1) Fusión/Depuración asistida (con consentimiento) # hub.fuse_scripts() # 2) Concordia Universalis: corpus y análisis corpus = hub.build_corpus( query=“arquitectura hermética templaria”, local_subpath="", sql_condition=“departamento LIKE ‘Arquitectura%’” ) analysis = hub.analyze_corpus_with_gpt4aii( corpus, mode=“comparative”, objectives=[“comparación de escuelas”, “mapa conceptual”, “síntesis ejecutiva”] ) # 3) Exportación ceremonial del Atlas hub.export_atlas(corpus, analysis, name=“atlas_architectura_hermetica”) print(”= Clausura Calicis Hermeticus =”) # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XII] OPERATIO # ======================================================== # ========================================================== # [BLOCCUS XIII] IUDICIUM – Notitia Defectuum et Emendationum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Registro de “issues” (vacíos, duplicidades, metadatos faltantes) # detectados por GPT4AII, vinculados a la tabla public.issues

y referenciados a public.archivos (archivo_id). # ============================================================ def _map_issue_to_archivo_id(self, issue_ref): """ """ try: sql = """ """ rows = self.query_postgres(sql, (issue_ref, issue_ref)) return rows[0][0] if rows else None except Exception as e: print(f”[!] Error resolviendo referencia ‘{issue_ref}’: {e}”) return None def _prepare_issues_from_analysis(self, analysis): """ """ issues = [] # Se espera que analysis contenga una sección ‘issues’ (flexible) raw = analysis.get(“issues”) or analysis.get(“audit”) or analysis.get(“detected_issues”) or [] for item in raw: issues.append({ “tipo”: item.get(“type”) or item.get(“categoria”) or “sin_metadatos”, “referencia”: item.get(“reference”) or item.get(“ref”) or item.get(“ruta”) or item.get(“nombre”) or “desconocido”, “esperado”: item.get(“expected”) or item.get(“esperado”) or "", “detalle”: item.get(“details”) or item.get(“detalle”) or item.get(“message”) or "", “severidad”: item.get(“severity”) or “media” }) print(f”[⚖] Issues preparados: {len(issues)}”) return issues def register_issue(self, issue): """ """ archivo_id = self._map_issue_to_archivo_id(issue[“referencia”]) try: conn = psycopg2.connect(**self.db_config) cur = conn.cursor() cur.execute(""" """, (issue[“tipo”], issue[“referencia”], issue[“esperado”], issue[“detalle”], issue[“severidad”], archivo_id)) conn.commit() cur.close(); conn.close() status = f”[✍] Issue registrado: {issue[‘tipo’]} → {issue[‘referencia’]}

(archivo_id={archivo_id})” print(status) with open(self.cleanup_log, “a”, encoding=“utf-8”) as log: log.write(status + “\n”) return True except Exception as e: print(f”[!] Error registrando issue ‘{issue}’: {e}”) return False def register_issues_from_analysis(self, analysis, ask_consent=True): """ """ issues = self._prepare_issues_from_analysis(analysis) count_ok = 0 for iss in issues: print(“\n[⚖] Propuesta de issue:”) print(f”- Tipo: {iss[‘tipo’]}”) print(f”- Referencia: {iss[‘referencia’]}”) print(f”- Esperado: {iss[‘esperado’]}”) print(f”- Severidad: {iss[‘severidad’]}”) print(f”- Detalle: {iss[‘detalle’][:300]}…”) proceed = “sí” if ask_consent: proceed = input(“¿Deseas registrar este issue en la base? (sí/no): “).strip().lower() if proceed == “sí”: if self.register_issue(iss): count_ok += 1 else: print(”[✘] Issue omitido por consentimiento.”) print(f”[✶] Issues registrados: {count_ok} / {len(issues)}”) return count_ok # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XIII] IUDICIUM # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XIV] OPERATIO IUDICII – Sigillum Correctionis # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Ejemplo de invocación: posterior al análisis del Corpus, # registrar los issues detectados por GPT4AII. # ========================================================== if name == “main”: print(”=== Initium Calicis

Hermeticus ===”) hub = OperatorHub( mendeley_token=“TOKEN_MENDELEY”, gpt4aii_key=“CLAVE_GPT4AII”, db_config={“dbname”:“quaerere_bibliotheca”,“user”:“shim_admin”,“password”:“9988X”,“host”:“localhost”,“port”:“5432”} ) # 1) Construir corpus y analizar (ejemplo) corpus = hub.build_corpus( query=“arquitectura hermética templaria”, local_subpath="", sql_condition=“departamento LIKE ‘Arquitectura%’” ) analysis = hub.analyze_corpus_with_gpt4aii( corpus, mode=“audit”, objectives=[“detección de vacíos”, “duplicidades”, “metadatos faltantes”, “recomendaciones”] ) # 2) Registrar issues con consentimiento ritualizado hub.register_issues_from_analysis(analysis, ask_consent=True) print(”= Clausura Calicis Hermeticus =”) # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XIV] OPERATIO IUDICII # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XV] EMENDATIO – Correctio et Restauratio # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Propuesta y ejecución de correcciones automáticas en la tabla archivos, # completando metadatos desde Mendeley/DOI/Web, con consentimiento ritual. # ========================================================== def propose_corrections(self, corpus): """ """ corrections = [] for item in corpus: missing = [] if not item.get(“autores”): missing.append(“autores”) if not item.get(“fecha”): missing.append(“fecha”) if not item.get(“resumen”):

missing.append(“resumen”) if not item.get(“metadatos”): missing.append(“metadatos”) if missing: corrections.append({ “referencia”: item.get(“ruta”) or item.get(“titulo”), “faltantes”: missing, “propuesta”: f”Completar {’, ‘.join(missing)} desde Mendeley/DOI/Web”, “fuente”: “Mendeley/DOI/Web” }) print(f”[⚗] Correcciones propuestas: {len(corrections)}”) return corrections def apply_correction(self, correction): """ """ try: conn = psycopg2.connect(**self.db_config) cur = conn.cursor() # Ejemplo: actualizar metadatos con información simbólica cur.execute(""" """, (json.dumps({“emendatio”: correction[“propuesta”]}), correction[“referencia”], correction[“referencia”])) conn.commit() cur.close(); conn.close() status = f”[✍] Corrección aplicada: {correction[‘referencia’]} → {correction[‘propuesta’]}” print(status) with open(self.cleanup_log, “a”, encoding=“utf-8”) as log: log.write(status + “\n”) return True except Exception as e: print(f”[!] Error aplicando corrección: {e}”) return False def emendatio(self, corpus, ask_consent=True): """ """ corrections = self.propose_corrections(corpus) count_ok = 0 for corr in corrections: print(“\n[⚖] Propuesta de corrección:”) print(f”- Referencia: {corr[‘referencia’]}”) print(f”- Faltantes: {’, ‘.join(corr[‘faltantes’])}”) print(f”- Propuesta: {corr[‘propuesta’]}”) print(f”- Fuente: {corr[‘fuente’]}”) proceed = “sí” if ask_consent: proceed = input(“¿Deseas aplicar esta corrección en la base? (sí/no): “).strip().lower() if proceed == “sí”: if

self.apply_correction(corr): count_ok += 1 else: print(”[✘] Corrección omitida por consentimiento.”) print(f”[✶] Correcciones aplicadas: {count_ok} / {len(corrections)}”) return count_ok # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XV] EMENDATIO # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XVI] OPERATIO EMENDATIONIS – Restauratio Codicum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Ejemplo de invocación: tras construir corpus y analizar, # aplicar correcciones automáticas con consentimiento. # ========================================================== if name == “main”: print(”= Initium Calicis Hermeticus =”) hub = OperatorHub( mendeley_token=“TOKEN_MENDELEY”, gpt4aii_key=“CLAVE_GPT4AII”, db_config={“dbname”:“quaerere_bibliotheca”,“user”:“shim_admin”,“password”:“9988X”,“host”:“localhost”,“port”:“5432”} ) # 1) Construir corpus corpus = hub.build_corpus( query=“arquitectura hermética templaria”, local_subpath="", sql_condition=“departamento LIKE ‘Arquitectura%’” ) # 2) Proponer y aplicar correcciones con consentimiento hub.emendatio(corpus, ask_consent=True) print(”= Clausura Calicis Hermeticus =”) # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XVI] OPERATIO EMENDATIONIS # ========================================================== #

========================================================== # [BLOCCUS XVII] ILLUMINATIO – Visiones Ritualis et Diagrammata # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Visualizaciones ritualizadas del corpus: # - Mappa Conceptuum (frecuencias de términos con NLTK) # - Chronologia (línea de tiempo por año con Matplotlib) # - Concordantia Auctorum (barras por autores más citados) # Todas las figuras se guardan en: ROOT_DIR/_atlas_ritualis/figurae # ========================================================== def _prepare_text_stream(self, corpus): """ """ parts = [] for item in corpus: titulo = item.get(“titulo”) or "" resumen = item.get(“resumen”) or "" parts.append(f”{titulo} {resumen}”) return “\n”.join(parts) def _tokenize_spanish(self, text): """ """ import re try: from nltk.corpus import stopwords stops = set(stopwords.words(“spanish”)) except Exception: stops = set() tokens = re.findall(r”[A-Za-zÁÉÍÓÚÜÑáéíóúüñ]{3,}”, text) tokens = [t.lower() for t in tokens if t.lower() not in stops] return tokens def figura_mappa_conceptuum(self, corpus, top_n=25, out_dir=None, name=“fig_mappa_conceptuum”): """ """ import matplotlib.pyplot as plt from collections import Counter out_dir = out_dir or os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”, “figurae”) os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True) stream = self._prepare_text_stream(corpus) tokens = self._tokenize_spanish(stream) freq = Counter(tokens).most_common(top_n) if not freq: print(”[⚠] Sin términos suficientes para

Mappa Conceptuum.”) return None labels, values = zip(*freq) plt.figure(figsize=(12, 7)) plt.barh(labels, values, color=“#5a3f99”) plt.gca().invert_yaxis() plt.title(“Mappa Conceptuum – Top Termini”, fontsize=14) plt.xlabel(“Frecuencia”) plt.tight_layout() path = os.path.join(out_dir, f”{name}.png”) plt.savefig(path, dpi=140) plt.close() print(f”[✶] Mappa Conceptuum exportada → {path}”) return path def figura_chronologia(self, corpus, out_dir=None, name=“fig_chronologia”): """ """ import matplotlib.pyplot as plt from collections import Counter out_dir = out_dir or os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”, “figurae”) os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True) years = [] for item in corpus: y = item.get(“fecha”) if isinstance(y, int): years.append(y) else: # Intento mínimo de extracción de año desde string try: ys = str(y) for token in ys.split(): if token.isdigit() and 1500 ⇐ int(token) ⇐ 2100: years.append(int(token)); break except Exception: pass if not years: print(”[⚠] Sin años detectados para Chronologia.”) return None counts = Counter(years) xs = sorted(counts.keys()) ys = [counts[x] for x in xs] plt.figure(figsize=(12, 5)) plt.plot(xs, ys, color=“#2b7a78”, linewidth=2, marker=“o”) plt.title(“Chronologia – Documenta per Annos”, fontsize=14) plt.xlabel(“Annus”) plt.ylabel(“Documenta”) plt.grid(alpha=0.3) plt.tight_layout() path = os.path.join(out_dir, f”{name}.png”) plt.savefig(path, dpi=140) plt.close() print(f”[✶] Chronologia exportada → {path}”) return path def

figura_concordantia_auctorum(self, corpus, top_n=15, out_dir=None, name=“fig_concordantia_auctorum”): """ """ import matplotlib.pyplot as plt from collections import Counter out_dir = out_dir or os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”, “figurae”) os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True) authors = [] for item in corpus: aut = item.get(“autores”) if isinstance(aut, list): authors.extend([a for a in aut if a]) elif isinstance(aut, str) and aut.strip(): # Separación básica por comas authors.extend([a.strip() for a in aut.split(”,”) if a.strip()]) if not authors: print(”[⚠] Sin autores suficientes para Concordantia Auctorum.”) return None freq = Counter(authors).most_common(top_n) labels, values = zip(*freq) plt.figure(figsize=(12, 7)) plt.barh(labels, values, color=“#c44536”) plt.gca().invert_yaxis() plt.title(“Concordantia Auctorum – Top Auctores”, fontsize=14) plt.xlabel(“Frecuencia”) plt.tight_layout() path = os.path.join(out_dir, f”{name}.png”) plt.savefig(path, dpi=140) plt.close() print(f”[✶] Concordantia Auctorum exportada → {path}”) return path def illuminatio(self, corpus, consent=True): """ """ figuras = [] def ask(msg): if not consent: return “sí” return input(f”{msg} (sí/no): “).strip().lower() # Mappa Conceptuum if ask(“¿Deseas generar la Mappa Conceptuum?“) == “sí”: p = self.figura_mappa_conceptuum(corpus) if p: figuras.append(p) # Chronologia if ask(“¿Deseas generar la Chronologia?“) == “sí”: p = self.figura_chronologia(corpus) if p: figuras.append(p) # Concordantia

Auctorum if ask(“¿Deseas generar la Concordantia Auctorum?“) == “sí”: p = self.figura_concordantia_auctorum(corpus) if p: figuras.append(p) with open(self.cleanup_log, “a”, encoding=“utf-8”) as log: for fig in figuras: log.write(f”[✶] Figura generada: {fig}\n”) print(f”[✶] Illuminationes completadas: {len(figuras)} figurae.”) return figuras # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XVII] ILLUMINATIO # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XVIII] OPERATIO ILLUMINATIONIS – Lux et Forma # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Ejemplo de invocación: generar visualizaciones del corpus. # ========================================================== if name == “main”: print(”= Initium Calicis Hermeticus =”) hub = OperatorHub( mendeley_token=“TOKEN_MENDELEY”, gpt4aii_key=“CLAVE_GPT4AII”, db_config={“dbname”:“quaerere_bibliotheca”,“user”:“shim_admin”,“password”:“9988X”,“host”:“localhost”,“port”:“5432”} ) corpus = hub.build_corpus( query=“arquitectura hermética templaria”, local_subpath="", sql_condition=“departamento LIKE ‘Arquitectura%’” ) # Generación con consentimiento ritualizado figuras = hub.illuminatio(corpus, consent=True) print(”= Clausura Calicis Hermeticus =”) # ============================================================ # [FIN BLOCCUS XVIII] OPERATIO ILLUMINATIONIS #

========================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XIX] TRANSLATIO – Manuscriptum Ritualis et Nexus # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Exportación avanzada en Markdown: # - Index (Catalogus), Tabula Contentorum (TOC), Referentiae (DOI/URLs) # - Incrustación de figuras (Illuminatio) # - Enlaces cruzados a archivos locales y registros SQL # - Cierre ceremonial con metadata y firma de cáliz # ========================================================== def _resolve_doi(self, item): """ """ md = item.get(“metadatos”) or {} doi = md.get(“doi”) or md.get(“DOI”) if doi and isinstance(doi, str): return doi.strip() url = item.get(“ruta”) or md.get(“url”) or md.get(“link”) if url and isinstance(url, str) and (“doi.org” in url or url.startswith(“http”)): return url.strip() return None def _markdown_link(self, label, path_or_url): """ """ if not path_or_url: return label return f”{label}” def translatio(self, corpus, analysis=None, figuras=None, out_dir=None, name=“manuscriptum_calicis”, ask_consent=True): """ """ import datetime out_dir = out_dir or os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”) os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True) md_path = os.path.join(out_dir, f”{name}.md”) # Consentimiento ritualizado proceed = “sí” if ask_consent: proceed = input(f”¿Deseas producir el Manuscriptum ‘{name}.md’? (sí/no): “).strip().lower() if proceed != “sí”: print(”[✘]

Translatio omitida por consentimiento.”) return None stamp = datetime.datetime.now().strftime(“%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S”) lines = [] # --- Frontispicium --- lines.append(f”# Manuscriptum Calicis – Translatio”) lines.append("") lines.append(f”- Generatio: {stamp}”) lines.append(f”- Documenta: {len(corpus)}”) lines.append(f”- Radix: {ROOT_DIR}”) lines.append("") lines.append(”---”) lines.append("") # --- Tabula Contentorum (TOC) --- lines.append(”## Tabula Contentorum”) lines.append(”- Catalogus”) lines.append(”- Atlas Figuratus”) lines.append(”- Analysis GPT4AII”) lines.append(”- Referentiae et Nexus”) lines.append(”- Sigillum et Clausura”) lines.append("") lines.append(”---”) lines.append("") # --- Catalogus --- lines.append(”## Catalogus”) for i, item in enumerate(corpus, 1): tit = item.get(“titulo”) or “Sin título” aut = item.get(“autores”) aut_str = ”, “.join(aut) if isinstance(aut, list) else (aut or “Autor desconocido”) ann = item.get(“fecha”) or “s.d.” ruta = item.get(“ruta”) doc_link = self._markdown_link(“Accedere”, ruta) if ruta else “Accedere” doi_url = self._resolve_doi(item) doi_link = self._markdown_link(“DOI/URL”, doi_url) if doi_url else ”—” lines.append(f”- {i}. [{item[‘origen’]}] {tit} — {aut_str} — {ann} — {doc_link} — {doi_link}”) lines.append("") lines.append(”---”) lines.append("") # --- Atlas Figuratus --- lines.append(”## Atlas Figuratus”) if figuras:

lines.append(”> Figurae illuminationis:”) for fig in figuras: rel = os.path.relpath(fig, out_dir) lines.append(f"") else: lines.append(“Nulla figura. Invoca ‘illuminatio’ ante Translatio.”) lines.append("") lines.append(”---”) lines.append("") # --- Analysis GPT4AII --- lines.append(”## Analysis GPT4AII”) if analysis: try: import json lines.append(“json") lines.append(json.dumps(analysis, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)) lines.append("”) except Exception: lines.append(“Analysis non formattata: error in JSON.”) else: lines.append(“Nullus analysis. Invoca ‘analyze_corpus_with_gpt4aii’ ante Translatio.”) lines.append("") lines.append(”---”) lines.append("") # --- Referentiae et Nexus --- lines.append(”## Referentiae et Nexus”) refs_count = 0 for item in corpus: tit = item.get(“titulo”) or “Sin título” doi_url = self._resolve_doi(item) ruta = item.get(“ruta”) if doi_url or ruta: refs_count += 1 tit_safe = tit.replace(”|”, ”—”) parts = [] if ruta: parts.append(self._markdown_link(“Archivo”, ruta)) if doi_url: parts.append(self._markdown_link(“DOI/URL”, doi_url)) lines.append(f”- {tit_safe}: ” + ” | “.join(parts)) if refs_count == 0: lines.append(“Nullae referentiae detectae.”) lines.append("") lines.append(”---”) lines.append("") # --- Sigillum et Clausura --- lines.append(”## Sigillum et Clausura”) lines.append(”> Acta sunt: manuscripta, figurae, nexus. Cáliz sellado para memoria instituta.”) lines.append("") # Escribir archivo with open(md_path, “w”,

encoding=“utf-8”) as f: f.write(“\n”.join(lines)) # Log ceremonial with open(self.cleanup_log, “a”, encoding=“utf-8”) as log: log.write(f”[✶] Manuscriptum exportatum: {md_path}\n”) print(f”[✶] Translatio completada → {md_path}”) return md_path # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XIX] TRANSLATIO # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XX] OPERATIO TRANSLATIONIS – Calix Manuscripta # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Ejemplo de invocación: incrustar figuras, análisis y enlaces. # ========================================================== if name == “main”: print(”= Initium Calicis Hermeticus =”) hub = OperatorHub( mendeley_token=“TOKEN_MENDELEY”, gpt4aii_key=“CLAVE_GPT4AII”, db_config={“dbname”:“quaerere_bibliotheca”,“user”:“shim_admin”,“password”:“9988X”,“host”:“localhost”,“port”:“5432”} ) # Corpus y análisis (de bloques previos) corpus = hub.build_corpus( query=“arquitectura hermética templaria”, local_subpath="", sql_condition=“departamento LIKE ‘Arquitectura%’” ) analysis = hub.analyze_corpus_with_gpt4aii(corpus, mode=“synthesis”) # Figuras (Illuminatio) figuras = [] figuras.append(hub.figura_mappa_conceptuum(corpus)) figuras.append(hub.figura_chronologia(corpus)) figuras.append(hub.figura_concordantia_auctorum(corpus)) figuras = [p for p in figuras if p] # Translatio con consentimiento

hub.translatio(corpus, analysis=analysis, figuras=figuras, name=“manuscriptum_architectura_hermetica”, ask_consent=True) print(”= Clausura Calicis Hermeticus =”) # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XX] OPERATIO TRANSLATIONIS # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XXI bis] CUSTODIA – Sigillum Duplex (SHA-256 + SHA3) # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Añade cálculo de SHA3-256 junto al SHA-256 tradicional. # Registra ambos en custodia/metadata, con sidecar .sha256 y .sha3. # ========================================================== def _compute_sha3(self, file_path, chunk_size=65536): """ """ import hashlib h = hashlib.sha3_256() with open(file_path, “rb”) as f: while True: data = f.read(chunk_size) if not data: break h.update(data) return h.hexdigest() def _write_sha3_sidecar(self, file_path, sha3_hex): """ """ sidecar = file_path + “.sha3” with open(sidecar, “w”, encoding=“utf-8”) as f: f.write(f”SHA3-256 {sha3_hex}\n”) f.write(f”FILE {file_path}\n”) return sidecar def custodia(self, files, scope=“manuscriptum”, ask_consent=True): """ """ sealed = [] for fp in files: if not fp or not os.path.exists(fp): print(f”[⚠] Pieza no encontrada: {fp}”) continue sha256_hex = self._compute_sha256(fp) sha3_hex = self._compute_sha3(fp) print(“\n[⚗] Propuesta de sellado:”) print(f”- Pieza: {fp}”) print(f”- SHA-256:

{sha256_hex}”) print(f”- SHA3-256: {sha3_hex}”) print(f”- Ámbito: {scope}”) proceed = “sí” if ask_consent: proceed = input(“¿Deseas sellar esta pieza (registrar hash SHA-256 y SHA3-256)? (sí/no): “).strip().lower() if proceed == “sí”: sidecar256 = self._write_sha256_sidecar(fp, sha256_hex) sidecar3 = self._write_sha3_sidecar(fp, sha3_hex) ok = self._register_hash_in_db(fp, sha256_hex, scope=scope, extra={“sidecar256”: sidecar256, “sha3”: sha3_hex, “sidecar3”: sidecar3}) if ok: sealed.append({“file”: fp, “sha256”: sha256_hex, “sha3”: sha3_hex, “sidecar256”: sidecar256, “sidecar3”: sidecar3}) else: print(”[✘] Sellado omitido por consentimiento.”) print(f”[✶] Custodia completada: {len(sealed)} piezas selladas con SHA-256 y SHA3-256.”) return sealed # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XXI bis] CUSTODIA # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XXII] OPERATIO CUSTODIAE – Sigillum et Fides # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Ejemplo de invocación: # - Sella manuscrito (Translatio) y figurae (Illuminatio) # - Registra hash y crea sidecar .sha256 # ========================================================== if name == “main”: print(”= Initium Calicis Hermeticus =”) hub = OperatorHub( mendeley_token=“TOKEN_MENDELEY”, gpt4aii_key=“CLAVE_GPT4AII”,

db_config={“dbname”:“quaerere_bibliotheca”,“user”:“shim_admin”,“password”:“9988X”,“host”:“localhost”,“port”:“5432”} ) # Asume que ya generaste Translatio e Illuminatio: atlas_dir = os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”) manus = os.path.join(atlas_dir, “manuscriptum_architectura_hermetica.md”) figuras_dir = os.path.join(atlas_dir, “figurae”) figuras = [] if os.path.isdir(figuras_dir): for f in os.listdir(figuras_dir): if f.lower().endswith(“.png”): figuras.append(os.path.join(figuras_dir, f)) piezas = [manus] + figuras piezas = [p for p in piezas if os.path.exists(p)] # Custodia con consentimiento ritualizado hub.custodia(piezas, scope=“manuscriptum”, ask_consent=True) print(”= Clausura Calicis Hermeticus =”) # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XXII] OPERATIO CUSTODIAE # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XXIII] PROBATIO PERPETUA – Fides Aeterna Sigillorum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Verificación periódica de integridad: # - Relee sidecars .sha256 y .sha3 de piezas críticas # - Recalcula hashes SHA-256 y SHA3-256 # - Compara y, si no coincide, emite issues automáticos (con consentimiento) # - Opcional: agenda verificación ritual (cron-like) por carpeta # ========================================================== def _read_sidecar_hash(self, sidecar_path): """ """ if not

os.path.exists(sidecar_path): return None try: with open(sidecar_path, “r”, encoding=“utf-8”) as f: line = f.readline().strip() # Primera línea: “SHA-256 ” o “SHA3-256 ” parts = line.split() return parts[-1] if parts else None except Exception: return None def _prepare_issue_integrity(self, file_path, algo, expected, actual): """ """ return { “tipo”: “integridad_no_coincide”, “referencia”: file_path, “esperado”: f”{algo}={expected}”, “detalle”: f”Hash recalculado no coincide: {algo}={actual}”, “severidad”: “alta” } def _verify_piece_hashes(self, file_path, ask_consent=True): """ """ results = {“file”: file_path, “sha256”: None, “sha3”: None, “status”: “ok”} if not os.path.exists(file_path): print(f”[⚠] Pieza no existe: {file_path}”) results[“status”] = “missing” return results # SHA-256 sidecar256 = file_path + “.sha256” expected256 = self._read_sidecar_hash(sidecar256) actual256 = self._compute_sha256(file_path) results[“sha256”] = {“expected”: expected256, “actual”: actual256, “ok”: (expected256 == actual256 if expected256 else None)} if expected256 and expected256 != actual256: issue = self._prepare_issue_integrity(file_path, “SHA-256”, expected256, actual256) print(“\n[⚖] Discrepancia detectada (SHA-256):”) print(f”- Pieza: {file_path}”) print(f”- Esperado: {expected256}”) print(f”- Actual: {actual256}”) proceed = “sí” if ask_consent: proceed = input(“¿Registrar issue de integridad (SHA-256)? (sí/no): “).strip().lower() if proceed == “sí”:

self.register_issue(issue) else: print(”[✘] Issue de integridad (SHA-256) omitido por consentimiento.“) # SHA3-256 sidecar3 = file_path + “.sha3” expected3 = self._read_sidecar_hash(sidecar3) actual3 = self._compute_sha3(file_path) results[“sha3”] = {“expected”: expected3, “actual”: actual3, “ok”: (expected3 == actual3 if expected3 else None)} if expected3 and expected3 != actual3: issue = self._prepare_issue_integrity(file_path, “SHA3-256”, expected3, actual3) print(“\n[⚖] Discrepancia detectada (SHA3-256):”) print(f”- Pieza: {file_path}”) print(f”- Esperado: {expected3}”) print(f”- Actual: {actual3}”) proceed = “sí” if ask_consent: proceed = input(“¿Registrar issue de integridad (SHA3-256)? (sí/no): “).strip().lower() if proceed == “sí”: self.register_issue(issue) else: print(”[✘] Issue de integridad (SHA3-256) omitido por consentimiento.”) return results def probatio_perpetua(self, base_dir=None, patterns=(“.md”, “.png”, “.csv”), ask_consent=True): """ """ base_dir = base_dir or os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”) if not os.path.isdir(base_dir): print(f”[⚠] Carpeta no encontrada para probatio: {base_dir}”) return {“checked”: 0, “mismatches”: 0, “details”: []} checked = 0 mismatches = 0 details = [] print(f”[🕯] Iniciando Probatio Perpetua en: {base_dir}”) for root, _, files in os.walk(base_dir): for patt in patterns: # Filtrado manual por patrón simple candidates = [f for f in files if f.lower().endswith(patt.split("")[-1])] for fname in candidates: fp =

os.path.join(root, fname) result = self._verify_piece_hashes(fp, ask_consent=ask_consent) checked += 1 details.append(result) # Contar mismatches si alguno de los dos algoritmos falla sha256_ok = result[“sha256”][“ok”] sha3_ok = result[“sha3”][“ok”] if (sha256_ok is False) or (sha3_ok is False): mismatches += 1 with open(self.cleanup_log, “a”, encoding=“utf-8”) as log: log.write(f”[✶] Probatio Perpetua: checked={checked}, mismatches={mismatches}, dir={base_dir}\n”) print(f”[✶] Probatio Perpetua completada → verificadas: {checked}, discrepancias: {mismatches}”) return {“checked”: checked, “mismatches”: mismatches, “details”: details} # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XXIII] PROBATIO PERPETUA # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # [BLOCCUS XXIV] OPERATIO PROBATIONIS – Vigilantia Continua # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Ejemplo de invocación: # - Verifica manuscrito(s) y figurae en _atlas_ritualis # - Emite issues si alguna huella no coincide (con consentimiento) # ========================================================== if name == “main”: print(”= Initium Calicis Hermeticus =”) hub = OperatorHub( mendeley_token=“TOKEN_MENDELEY”, gpt4aii_key=“CLAVE_GPT4AII”, db_config={“dbname”:“quaerere_bibliotheca”,“user”:“shim_admin”,“password”:“9988X”,“host”:“localhost”,“port”:“5432”} ) # Verificación perpetua del

atlas ritualis resultado = hub.probatio_perpetua( base_dir=os.path.join(ROOT_DIR, “_atlas_ritualis”), patterns=(“.md”, “.png”, “*.csv”), ask_consent=True ) print(”= Clausura Calicis Hermeticus =”) # ========================================================== # [FIN BLOCCUS XXIV] OPERATIO PROBATIONIS # ==========================================================

Vista Gráfica

  • Ficha Tecnica
  • Contenido
  • -- coding: utf-8 -- """ OperatorHub ISAN – Calix Hermeticus Núcleo Maestro con fusión, consentimiento ritualizado y depuración inteligente Raíz: Q:\ISAN_Origen_Inteligente """ import os, psycopg2, requests # ==========================================================<span class="text-highlight"> # [BLOCCUS I] INITIUM – Fundamentum Hermeticum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Inicio del cáliz: configuración de credenciales y log ceremonial # </span>========================================================== class OperatorHub: def init(self, mendeley_token, gpt4aii_key, db_config): # ==========================================================<span class="text-highlight"> # [FIN BLOCCUS I] INITIUM # </span>========================================================<span class="text-highlight"> # </span>========================================================<span class="text-highlight"> # [BLOCCUS II] OCULUS – Quaerere Scriptum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Scanner ritualizado: recorre la raíz y detecta scripts candidatos # </span>========================================================<span class="text-highlight"> def scan_scripts(self): # </span>========================================================<span class="text-highlight"> # [FIN BLOCCUS II] OCULUS # </span>========================================================<span class="text-highlight"> # </span>========================================================== # [BLOCCUS III] SIGILLUM – Revisio Characterum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Revisión carácter por carácter: lectura y análisis preliminar
  • y referenciados a public.archivos (archivo_id). # ============================================================ def _map_issue_to_archivo_id(self, issue_ref): """ """ try: sql = """ """ rows = self.query_postgres(sql, (issue_ref, issue_ref)) return rows[0][0] if rows else None except Exception as e: print(f”[!] Error resolviendo referencia ‘{issue_ref}’: {e}”) return None def _prepare_issues_from_analysis(self, analysis): """ """ issues = [] # Se espera que analysis contenga una sección ‘issues’ (flexible) raw = analysis.get(“issues”) or analysis.get(“audit”) or analysis.get(“detected_issues”) or [] for item in raw: issues.append({ “tipo”: item.get(“type”) or item.get(“categoria”) or “sin_metadatos”, “referencia”: item.get(“reference”) or item.get(“ref”) or item.get(“ruta”) or item.get(“nombre”) or “desconocido”, “esperado”: item.get(“expected”) or item.get(“esperado”) or "", “detalle”: item.get(“details”) or item.get(“detalle”) or item.get(“message”) or "", “severidad”: item.get(“severity”) or “media” }) print(f”[⚖] Issues preparados: {len(issues)}”) return issues def register_issue(self, issue): """ """ archivo_id = self._map_issue_to_archivo_id(issue[“referencia”]) try: conn = psycopg2.connect(**self.db_config) cur = conn.cursor() cur.execute(""" """, (issue[“tipo”], issue[“referencia”], issue[“esperado”], issue[“detalle”], issue[“severidad”], archivo_id)) conn.commit() cur.close(); conn.close() status = f”[✍] Issue registrado: {issue[‘tipo’]} → {issue[‘referencia’]}

Creado con Quartz v4.5.2 © 2026

  • Oráculo Obsidian
  • GitHub
